mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, role, enabled FROM app_users ORDER BY id
SELECT id, username, password, role, enabled FROM app_users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, role, enabled FROM app_users WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_users ( username, password, role, enabled ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{enabled} )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_users SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, role = #{role}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_users WHERE role = 'ADMIN' AND enabled = TRUE
